real_public_sources.name: ABS Census 2021 General Community Profile SA2 DataPack
real_public_sources.coverage: National SA2 when public DataPack download is available

modelled_or_calculated_layers: Household indicators only when ABS Census SA2 DataPack is not available during refresh
Climate indicators until prepared BOM SA2 climate extracts are connected
Hazard indicators until Geoscience/state spatial layers are connected
Insurance affordability estimates because public SA2-level insurer premium data is not available

source_catalog.field_group: SA2 code, SA2 name, state and population
source_catalog.refresh_method: Automated ABS workbook download when source is available

source_catalog.field_group: IRSD and IER scores and deciles
source_catalog.refresh_method: Automated ABS workbook download when source is available

source_catalog.field_group: Income, rent, mortgage and household count
source_catalog.source: ABS Census 2021 General Community Profile SA2 DataPack
source_catalog.refresh_method: Automated ABS DataPack download with governed fallback
source_catalog.business_use: Insurance affordability denominator and household scale

source_catalog.field_group: Rainfall, temperature, heat days and rainfall anomaly
Flood, bushfire, cyclone and storm scores
source_catalog.source: Geoscience Australia, data.gov.au and state open-data hazard layers

source_catalog.field_group: Estimated annual premium and premium-to-income ratio
source_catalog.refresh_method: Recalculated whenever input data is rebuilt

source_catalog.field_group: Property risk score, risk band and intervention priority
source_catalog.refresh_method: Recalculated whenever input data is rebuilt

next_data_hardening_steps: Monitor ABS Census DataPack endpoint and refresh household indicators on source updates
Connect Geoscience Australia and state hazard layers
Add commercial or partner insurance premium data if available
